value.author: codex-pm-changelog-integrator
value.text: Evidence: CI static gate failed on the first push because GitHub-source pm-changelog install included upstream tracker data with a local absolute path. Opened unbraind/pm-changelog#2, fixed upstream with pm history-redact at 0acca83160d2f9689b9e5f027cc49fb481686006, reinstalled via pm install --gh, and local static gate sequence now passes including pnpm changelog:pm:check and pnpm security:scan.

value.author: codex-pm-changelog-integrator
value.text: Evidence: CI static gate for 68f80d49 failed because the installed GitHub package's dist/ payload was ignored by pm-changelog's nested .gitignore and therefore absent from the checkout; node dist/cli.js could not load the extension entry and reported Unknown command changelog. Fixing by force-adding the installed package dist files produced by pm install --gh.

value.author: codex-pm-changelog-integrator
value.text: Evidence: upstream pm-changelog issues #1 and #3 are fixed and closed. Installed pm-changelog 2026.5.23-5 from GitHub main at f5ebc23c7e3dbc9d41ac687b14826fe5632e9d1a via pm install; upstream CI run 26343824903 passed. Package doctor is clean with runtime command changelog generate active; pnpm changelog:pm:check reports unchanged CHANGELOG.pm.md with 788 items. Local static gate passed: pnpm version:check && pnpm changelog:pm:check && pnpm security:scan && pnpm quality:static && npm pack --dry-run. Npm publish of 2026.5.23-5 is blocked by npm E403 requiring 2FA or a bypass-2FA token, so this repo is pinned to the verified GitHub source until authorized publish.

author: codex-pm-changelog-integrator

patch.value: Repository integration is implemented and verified, but npm publication of pm-changelog 2026.5.23-5 is blocked by npm E403 requiring two-factor authentication or a granular token with bypass 2FA. Current repo is pinned to verified GitHub source f5ebc23 with green upstream CI until an authorized publisher completes npm publish.

message: Block only on external npm publish authorization

patch.value: Implemented pm-cli npm package runtime dependency installation for pm-changelog, installed latest npm pm-changelog 2026.5.24-1, generated and checked CHANGELOG.pm.md through the package command, wired latest install into CI/release scripts, filed pm-changelog#4 for package sourcemap warnings, and verified package doctor, linked tests, release gate slice, dogfood, and validation.

author: codex-changelog-integration

patch.value: Installed latest npm pm-changelog 2026.5.24-1, fixed pm-cli npm package runtime dependency installation for extension SDK imports, wired CI/release changelog checks to install and use the package, generated CHANGELOG.pm.md through pm changelog generate, filed upstream pm-changelog#4 for package sourcemap warnings, and verified linked package, changelog, release, and dogfood gates.

pm-cli installs and loads the latest npm pm-changelog package without manual changelog scripts; pm-changelog can generate the repository changelog; CI/CD release gates verify the package-generated changelog and npm/npx/bun release path.

Latest npm pm-changelog installs and loads with changelog generate active; CHANGELOG.pm.md is generated and checked through the package command; CI/release scripts refresh the package before generation; package doctor, linked tests, static release slice, run-gates slice, and package-first dogfood passed.
